positive: A sophisticated geometric celestial landscape design. The main subject is a stylized, interconnected network of constellations and planets, rendered as clean, interlocking geometric silhouettes (like minimalist mandala elements). The primary color palette is deep indigo, electric sapphire, and subtle metallic gold accents, contrasted sharply against a deep midnight blue background. The composition must be centered and highly symmetrical, suitable for seamless apparel printing. Incorporate abstract lunar phases and nebulous swirling patterns rendered with strong line work and negative space. The style should be modern, high-contrast, and highly detailed, reminiscent of Art Deco meets scientific diagram.
